data.description: TikTok website is now accessible in India, but users report the app is still not accessible. The platform was earlier banned by the Indian government.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell shifted tone at Jackson Hole, warning of rising employment risks. Market reacts - yields tumble, dollar falls, stocks soar. A September rate cut now certain.
data.description: Jerome Powell, the Chair of the Federal Reserve, altered his stance at the Jackson Hole conference by stating that there is a rise in downside risks to employment and hinting at a possible adjustment in policy if the economic slowdown persists. This unexpected dovish message surprised Wall Street as many economists anticipated a more cautious, inflation-centric approach with no indication of rate cuts. However, Powell emphasized labor market concerns and acknowledged weakening growth, potentially paving the way for easing measures. Consequently, market reactions were swift, with Treasury yields dropping, the U.S. dollar depreciating significantly, and stocks rallying, indicating a high likelihood of a rate cut in September. For more details, visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

data.title: ATP and PIF launch ATP Tennis IQ Powered by PIF, providing performance analytics to 2,000 singles players in the ATP Rankings.
data.description: In an unprecedented move, the ATP and PIF have introduced ATP Tennis IQ Powered by PIF in New York, Riyadh, and London. This innovative technology platform aims to transform the tennis landscape by providing improved data access, insights, and advanced match analytics. By offering this platform, up to 2,000 players within the ATP Tour and ATP Challenger Tour will have the opportunity to enhance their performance. The ATP Challenger Tour serves as a stepping stone for male professional tennis players, and through this platform, participants will have greater access to resources for reaching their peak performance levels.

data.title: Matheson Tri-Gas will build air separation plant in Las Vegas, Nevada by 2027, strengthening its national network.
data.description: Nippon Sanso Holdings Corporation's U.S. operating company, Matheson Tri-Gas, Inc., based in Irving, Texas, revealed plans to construct a new air separation plant in Las Vegas, Nevada by 2027. This project aims to enhance Matheson's network of air separation plants across the U.S., with a focus on the expanding Sunbelt region. Toshihiko Hamada serves as the President CEO of NSHD.

data.title: Fermi America partners with Parkhill and Lee Lewis Construction to build 11GW private AI grid in Texas.
data.description: In Amarillo, Texas, on August 22, 2025, Fermi America teamed up with the Texas Tech University System to reveal two significant collaborations with prominent industry leaders in West Texas and the Panhandle region. The partnerships involve Parkhill and Lee Lewis Construction, established local companies known for their expertise and reliability.

data.title: CIOs advised to prioritize stakeholder engagement by Info-Tech Research Group; currently only dedicating 13% of time.
data.description: According to data from Info-Tech Research Group's IT Staffing Assessment, CIOs are spending only 13% of their time on stakeholder engagement, despite its significant impact on organizational satisfaction. This finding highlights a potential area of concern for many IT leaders, as they may be overlooking crucial opportunities for engagement.

data.title: Stocks like Palantir, Oracle, AMD broke key levels, prompting investors to take action as Dow Jones Futures fall.
data.description: On Tuesday, companies like Palantir, Oracle, and AMD, known for their growth, experienced significant drops in their stock prices, breaking key levels. Investors are advised to carefully consider their next steps in light of these developments. Dow Jones Futures were also impacted by these movements, prompting concern among market participants. It is important for investors to stay informed and strategize accordingly in response to these fluctuations in the market.

data.title: Georgia Power is modernizing its hydro fleet to meet growing demand, celebrating National Hydropower Day on August 24th.Characters: 99
data.description: On August 24, the National Hydropower Association, along with utilities nationwide, will commemorate National Hydropower Day to emphasize the significance of hydropower as a dependable and sustainable energy source. This annual event aims to raise awareness about the benefits of hydropower in generating renewable energy.

data.title: Graanul's consent and scheme solicitations for €250M Floating Rate Notes and €380M 4.625% Notes have expired.
data.description: Luxembourg, Graanul's consent solicitation and scheme solicitation for their existing Floating Rate Notes of €250,000,000 and 4.625% Sustainability-Linked Senior Secured Notes of €380,000,000, due 2026, has expired. The Floating Rate Notes have ISIN Number XS2397354015 and ISIN Number XS2397354288 for Regulation S Notes and Rule 144A Notes respectively. The 4.625% Sustainability-Linked Senior Secured Notes have ISIN Number XS2397354528.

data.title: CSX and BNSF introduce new intermodal services for coast-to-coast shipping, aiming to provide seamless solutions.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, and Fort Worth, Texas, on August 22, 2025, CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) and BNSF revealed the introduction of multiple intermodal service offerings. These new products aim to provide customers with smooth and effective coast-to-coast shipping solutions connecting the western and eastern regions of the United States.
